product_overview: vsyncnotes is an offline-first desktop notes app with end-to-end encryption, hierarchical notebooks, rich text editing, search, trash recovery, and configurable sync to locations the user controls. It is designed to keep notes private while still making them easy to organize, find, and sync across devices.
core_goals: Unlock an encrypted vault with a master password or create a new vault
Create, organize, and manage notebooks and notes in a three-column workspace
Write and format notes with a rich text editor, including images and attachments
Search notes by title, notebook name, and full note content
Configure and run synchronization to a local folder, WebDAV server, or Nextcloud
Restore or permanently delete items from the trash

features.name: Vault Unlock
features.description: Let users open an existing encrypted vault with a master password or create a new vault when none exists.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Type master password -> Submit unlock form -> See the main workspace
Navigate to / -> Enter an incorrect master password -> Submit unlock form -> See an error message
Navigate to / -> Open the create vault flow -> Type a new password -> Confirm the new password -> Create the vault -> See the main workspace

features.name: Notebook Tree Navigation
features.description: Allow users to browse a hierarchical notebook structure and manage notebooks through create, rename, delete, child notebook creation, and drag-and-drop organization.
user_flows: Navigate to /main -> Select a notebook -> See its notes in the note list
Navigate to /main -> Create a new notebook -> See the notebook appear in the tree
Navigate to /main -> Open a notebook context menu -> Rename the notebook -> See the updated title in the tree
Navigate to /main -> Open a notebook context menu -> Create a child notebook -> See the nested notebook appear under its parent
Navigate to /main -> Drag a notebook to a new position or parent -> See the tree reorder accordingly
Navigate to /main -> Expand a notebook -> Collapse the notebook -> See its children hide and reappear

features.name: Note List
features.description: Show the notes for the selected notebook and let users create, open, reorder, pin, move, rename, and delete notes.
user_flows: Navigate to /main -> Select a notebook -> Select a note -> See the note open in the editor
Navigate to /main -> Select a notebook -> Create a new note -> See the note appear in the list and open in the editor
Navigate to /main -> Open a note context menu -> Pin the note -> See the pinned note move to the top of the list
Navigate to /main -> Open a note context menu -> Unpin the note -> See the note return to normal ordering
Navigate to /main -> Drag a note to a new position -> See the note list reorder
Navigate to /main -> Open a note context menu -> Delete the note -> See it removed from the current list

features.name: Rich Text Editor
features.description: Provide a rich text editing area for composing notes with formatting, images, auto-save, and editing utilities.
user_flows: Navigate to /main -> Select a note -> Type note content -> See the editor update and auto-save status change
Navigate to /main -> Select a note -> Apply text formatting from the toolbar -> See the selected text change style
Navigate to /main -> Select a note -> Paste or drag an image into the editor -> See the image inserted into the note
Navigate to /main -> Select a note -> Toggle spell check -> See spelling behavior change in the editor
Navigate to /main -> Select a note -> Open the editor context menu -> Use editing actions such as cut, copy, or paste -> See the content change accordingly
Navigate to /main -> Select a note -> Make edits -> Wait briefly -> See the save indicator switch to saved

features.name: Full-text Search
features.description: Let users search across note titles, content, and notebook names using a search modal with incremental results.
user_flows: Navigate to /main -> Open the search modal -> Type a search query -> See matching results appear
Navigate to /main -> Open the search modal -> Type a partial word -> See fuzzy matching results appear
Navigate to /main -> Open the search modal -> Choose a result -> See the matching note open in the editor

features.name: Sync Configuration
features.description: Allow users to configure synchronization to a local filesystem, WebDAV, or Nextcloud target and run sync manually or automatically.
user_flows: Navigate to /settings -> Select a filesystem provider -> Enter a target path -> Save the configuration -> Return to the main app
Navigate to /settings -> Select a WebDAV provider -> Enter server URL and credentials -> Test the connection -> Save the configuration
Navigate to /settings -> Select a Nextcloud provider -> Enter the server URL -> Save the configuration -> Return to the main app
Navigate to /settings -> Open sync settings -> Adjust the auto-sync interval -> Save the configuration
Navigate to /settings -> Click sync now -> See sync progress complete and return to the app

features.name: Trash / Soft Delete
features.description: Show deleted notes and notebooks in a trash view and let users restore items or permanently remove them.
user_flows: Navigate to /main -> Open the trash view -> See the list of deleted items
Navigate to /main -> Open the trash view -> Select a deleted item -> Restore it -> See it return to its original location
Navigate to /main -> Open the trash view -> Select a deleted item -> Permanently delete it -> See it removed from the trash

features.name: Quick Create Note
features.description: Enable fast note creation from anywhere through a modal that accepts a title, optional content, and target notebook.
user_flows: Navigate to /main -> Open the quick create modal -> Type a note title -> Optionally type content -> Select a target notebook -> Create the note -> See it appear in the note list and open in the editor

routes.description: Unlock view - password entry to decrypt vault
Main 3-column layout with notebook tree, note list, and editor
Settings page with sync configuration (filesystem, WebDAV, Nextcloud)

features.name: Vault Unlock
features.description: Enter master password to decrypt the vault and access notes
user_interactions: Type master password in password input
Click unlock button or press Enter
See error message on wrong password
Click create vault link to set up a new vault
Type new password and confirm password
Click create button to create vault

features.name: Notebook Tree Navigation
features.description: Hierarchical notebook tree with create, rename, delete, drag-and-drop reorder
user_interactions: Click notebook to select it and show its notes
Click add button to create new notebook
Right-click notebook for context menu (rename, delete, create child)
Drag notebook to reorder or move to new parent
Expand/collapse notebook children with chevron

features.name: Note List
features.description: List of notes in selected notebook with sort, create, delete, pin functionality
user_interactions: Click note to select and open in editor
Click add button to create new note
Right-click note for context menu (rename, delete, pin/unpin, move)
Drag note to reorder
See pinned notes at top of list

features.name: Rich Text Editor
features.description: Tiptap-based WYSIWYG editor with formatting toolbar, auto-save, image support
user_interactions: Type note content in the editor area
Use toolbar buttons for formatting (bold, italic, headings, lists, etc.)
Paste or drag images into editor
Toggle spell check on/off
Right-click for context menu (cut, copy, paste, spell check, read aloud)
See auto-save indicator (Saved, Saving..., Unsaved)

features.name: Full-text Search
features.description: Search notes by title and content with fuzzy matching
user_interactions: Click search icon or press keyboard shortcut to open search modal
Type search query in input field
Click search result to navigate to note

features.name: Sync Configuration
features.description: Configure sync provider (filesystem, WebDAV, Nextcloud) and run manual/auto sync
user_interactions: Select sync provider (filesystem, WebDAV, Nextcloud)
Enter filesystem path or WebDAV/Nextcloud credentials
Click test connection button for WebDAV/Nextcloud
Click save to store sync configuration
Click sync now to run manual sync
Configure auto-sync interval

features.name: Trash / Soft Delete
features.description: Deleted notes and notebooks go to trash with restore and permanent delete
user_interactions: Open trash modal from sidebar
View trashed items
Click restore to recover item
Click permanent delete to remove forever

features.name: Quick Create Note
features.description: Modal to quickly create a note from anywhere with keyboard shortcut
user_interactions: Open quick create modal with keyboard shortcut
Type note title and optional content
Select target notebook
Click create to add note

known_limitations.issue: App requires Tauri runtime for backend commands (invoke calls). In a browser-only context, all Tauri API calls will fail.
known_limitations.impact: Tests in browser will only validate UI rendering and component structure, not full data flows

known_limitations.issue: No vue-router - view switching is handled by Pinia state (currentView)
known_limitations.impact: Routes are not URL-based, navigation depends on app state
UI text will appear in Spanish by default
